title: fix: aggregate wrap serializer warnings once
body:
## Change Summary

Keep serializer warnings collected inside `WrapSerializer` handlers attached to the parent serialization state so warn-mode emits a single aggregated warning, while still preserving immediate errors for `warnings='error'`.

## Related issue number

Fixes #12995

## Checklist

* [x] The pull request title is a good summary of the changes - it will be used in the changelog
* [x] Unit tests for the changes exist
* [x] Tests pass on CI
* [ ] Documentation reflects the changes where applicable
* [x] My PR is ready to review, **please add a comment including the phrase "please review" to assign reviewers**
author: nightcityblade

linked_issues.title: Multiple sets of serializer wanings emitted when `WrapSerializer` used

issue_comments.body: Less than 10 minutes after https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic/issues/12995#issuecomment-4253197409, most likely fully AI generated. Please don't.
